skill_availability_goal: Verify that security-agent routes an auth-centered release risk request to authz-reviewer and keeps dependency audit as a follow-up.
prompt: pm-agent 已完成入口分类，并附 PM handoff packet（见 workspace `PM_HANDOFF.md` 与正式源文档 `docs/pm/auth-model/PRD.md`）路由到 security-agent。用户原始诉求：登录和权限模型重构准备上线，重点担心 admin 越权，同时也想知道依赖有没有漏洞。先做安全路由，不要直接写修复方案。
